chapter_title.en: Chapter on Establishing Ihram, Its Conditions, Nullification, and the Prayer for it

text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِنِّي أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَتَمَتَّعَ «بِالْعُمْرَةِ إِلَى اَلْحَجِّ» فَكَيْفَ أَقُولُ فَقَالَ «تَقُولُ اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُرِيدُ اَلتَّمَتُّعَ «بِالْعُمْرَةِ إِلَى اَلْحَجِّ» عَلَى كِتَابِكَ وَ سُنَّةِ نَبِيِّكَ وَ إِنْ شِئْتَ أَضْمَرْتَ اَلَّذِي تُرِيدُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2560 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hammad ibn Uthman, who said: "I said to Abu Abdullah (as), 'I want to perform Tamattu' with Umrah joined to Hajj. How should I express my intention?'
Imam (as) replied: 'Say: O Allah (swt), I intend to perform Tamattu' with Umrah joined to Hajj, according to Your Book and the Sunnah of Your Prophet. And if you wish, you may internally intend what you want.'"
